passives.name: Gusto
passives.effects: {{tip|Turret}} basic attacks are modified to deal {{as|45% of this minion's '''maximum''' health}} as {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}}.

passives.name: Minion Wounder
passives.effects: Against lane minions, this minion deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} on-hit equal to {{as|2% of the target's '''current''' health}}.

effects_structured.raw: {{tip Turret}} basic attacks are modified to deal {{as 45% of this minion's '''maximum''' health}} as {{tt pre-mitigation damage Damage calculated before modifiers}}.
Against lane minions, this minion deals {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}} on-hit equal to {{as 2% of the target's '''current''' health}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Gusto represents melee-minion-specific combat rules rather than a player-purchasable effect payload.
Player-visible behavior: turret shots against affected minions use a fixed pre-mitigation max-health damage rule, and lane-minion on-hit damage includes a current-health component.
Source page is the Melee minion rules page because Gusto is represented there as a cosmetic item carrying these minion rules.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
